baseline.interpretation: The baseline deliberately instantiates the regularities measured by CCSF. Its AUCs are not independent validation or operational performance estimates.

independent_validation.composition: 156 accounts (60 coordinated, 60 organic-style control, 36 vocabulary-matched professional control), 1248 posts, 8 topics, 3 prompt families, 2 temperatures, 4 transformation conditions
independent_validation.interpretation: Preliminary external-generalisation evidence. Controls are LLM-generated; automated transformations only; no human editing; wide CIs. Stage 1 fixed-direction composite does not transfer (pooled AUC 0.394).
